# Launch Maturity Gate

Use this optional gate when the product is moving from MVP validation to launch or sustained production use.

## Founder Bottleneck Audit

| Workflow Or Decision | What Happens If Founder Is Away One Week | Automate | Delegate | Founder-Only Judgment | Fix |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Ops Automation Candidates

| Workflow | Trigger | Decision Rules | Output | Owner Or System | Escalation Path |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Launch Readiness Exit Criteria

- Growth is tied to named channels and unit economics.
- Product handles expected production workload.
- Support, triage, reporting, and feedback loops do not depend on founder memory.

## Decision

```text
READY | NEEDS_SYSTEMS | NOT_APPLICABLE
```
